# Lisa Wood Studio

> Lisa Wood Studio — large-scale landscape photography, writing, and installation made through a practice of sustained attention and discomfort.

Lisa Wood Studio is the website of artist Lisa Wood — work across Visual, Writing, Conceptual, Installation, Applications, and Commissions.

## Practice

To luxuriate in discomfort is to step into challenging conditions and stay there long enough for perception to change — driven by adventure, rewarded with discovery.

Lisa Wood works at remote field sites across volcanic, desert, winter, and ice terrain, returning with large-scale photographs — and with writing and installation — that ask for the same sustained attention they were made with.

## Work

### Visual

- Surface Surveys (Photography)
- Winterblue (Photography)
- Totems & Sentinels (Photography) — In preparation.
- Flipped (Photography) — In preparation.
- Omani Landscapes (Photography) — In preparation.

### Writing

- Luxuriate in Discomfort (Book)
- Lost Vibrations (White paper) — In preparation.
- Cold and Heat (Poetry) — In preparation.
- A Veiled Landscape (Essay) — In preparation.
- The Time of Becoming (Book series, In progress) — In preparation.
- The Art of Falling (Course, In progress) — In preparation.

### Conceptual

- Micron House (Conceptual) — In preparation.
- LUX Practice (Conceptual) — In preparation.

### Installation

- Side Effects (Installation) — In preparation.
- ECS (Installation) — In preparation.
- Attention (Installation) — In preparation.
- 21st Century in Black & White (Installation) — In preparation.
- Luxuriate in Discomfort — One Night Only (Installation, One night only show)
- Mind the Gap (Installation) — In preparation.

### Applications

- SoloKit (Application) — In preparation.

### Commissions

- Viceroy - The Observatory (Commission)

## Pages

- [Home](https://lisawoodstudio.com/): Studio home — the full index of work across Visual, Writing, Conceptual, Installation, Applications, and Commissions.
- [Viceroy — The Observatory](https://lisawoodstudio.com/observatory.html): Viceroy — The Observatory: a commissioned presentation, a page within the site.
